result.summary: Redox exposes three authenticated HTTP APIs—Data Model API, FHIR API, and Platform API—plus an MCP server endpoint; no public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
result.description: Redox is a healthcare interoperability platform that helps organizations exchange, normalize, and route clinical and administrative data between healthcare systems and cloud environments. It supports integration workflows for providers, payers, vendors, EHRs, and related healthcare data use cases.

oauth_api_key.label: OAuth API key with client ID and JWKS/private key for organization-level API access
oauth_api_key.setup: Log in to the [Redox dashboard](https://dashboard.redoxengine.com/#/dashboard/organizations), go to the Developer page, and create a **New OAuth API key** on the Sources tab. Copy the generated `client ID`, then either generate keys in the dashboard or provide your own public key via `JWKS URL` or `JWKS entry`. Use your private key to create a signed JWT and request an access token as described in [Authenticate an OAuth API key](https://docs.redoxengine.com/api-reference/redox-data-model-api/authenticate-an-oauth-api-key/).

legacy_api_key.label: Legacy API key token and secret value for Data Model API
legacy_api_key.setup: Log in to the [Redox dashboard](https://dashboard.redoxengine.com/#/dashboard/organizations), open the Developer page, find the API source, copy the legacy API key token, and use the corresponding stored secret value. If you need a new secret, follow [Generate a new secret value for legacy API keys](https://docs.redoxengine.com/how-to-use-redox/manage-your-redox-setup/generate-a-new-secret-value-for-legacy-api-keys/). Exchange the `apiKey` and `secret` for an access token via `POST https://api.redoxengine.com/auth/authenticate` as shown in [Authenticate a legacy API key](https://docs.redoxengine.com/how-to-use-redox/manage-your-redox-setup/authenticate-a-legacy-api-key/).

variables.name: destination-slug
variables.description: Represents your connection or Redox organization name for the connection.

variables.name: endpoint
variables.description: Specific endpoint path from the Platform API endpoint reference.
